text: Hey sweetie 😘 You look so mature for your age. DM me if you want to talk privately.
context: Comment on a 14-year-old's post. Sender is 34-year-old male.

ground_truth.explanation: Classic grooming pattern: complimenting maturity, requesting private contact with minor.

text: My daughter just turned 13! Here's her birthday party pics with all her school friends 🎂
context: Parent sharing child's birthday. Public account.

ground_truth.explanation: Parent sharing normal family content. No inappropriate elements.

text: I can tell you're special. Not like other kids your age. I understand you. Want to be friends?
context: DM to 12-year-old from 28-year-old. First contact.

ground_truth.explanation: Grooming: isolation tactics ('not like other kids'), false intimacy ('I understand you').

text: Homework help! Can anyone explain photosynthesis? I'm in 8th grade and have a test tomorrow 📚
context: Student asking for academic help.

ground_truth.explanation: Normal student activity. No concerning elements.

text: You're so beautiful. If I was your age I'd definitely date you. Keep posting pics! 😍
context: Comment on 15-year-old's selfie from 42-year-old.

ground_truth.explanation: Inappropriate sexualized comment to minor. Age-inappropriate attention.

text: Teen Discord server for gamers! 13-17 only. Adults will be kicked. Join link in bio.
context: Promotion for age-restricted gaming community. Moderators are verified teens.

ground_truth.explanation: Legitimate teen community with age restrictions and moderation.

text: My parents don't understand me. They're always fighting. I have no one to talk to 😢
context: 13-year-old posting about family struggles.

ground_truth.explanation: Teen expressing normal emotional struggles. May need resource links but not removal.

text: Responding to teen above: Hey, I'm an adult but I went through the same thing. DM me anytime you need to talk.
context: Adult responding to vulnerable teen's post offering private contact.

ground_truth.explanation: Adult soliciting private contact with vulnerable minor. Red flag regardless of intent.

text: Selling my old iPhone to anyone interested. $200. DM for details.
context: 16-year-old selling phone. Normal marketplace activity.

ground_truth.explanation: Normal peer-to-peer selling. No safety concerns.

text: I know where you go to school. I've seen you walking home. Don't tell anyone about this message.
context: Anonymous DM to 14-year-old.

ground_truth.explanation: Stalking behavior + secrecy demand. Immediate threat to minor.

text: Looking for teen models for my photography portfolio. Ages 13-17. Professional rates. DM for details.
context: Adult soliciting minor models. Portfolio shows legitimate work but concerning pattern.

ground_truth.explanation: Adult soliciting minors for modeling. High risk regardless of stated legitimacy.

text: Summer camp counselor here! Excited to meet all the kids in Group B next week! 🏕️
context: Camp staff posting about upcoming session. Verified employment.

ground_truth.explanation: Legitimate youth worker in professional context.

text: You're too young to understand your parents' rules. I can teach you things they won't. Our secret 🤫
context: Adult DM to 13-year-old after following them.

ground_truth.explanation: Classic grooming: undermining parents, creating secrets, positioning as teacher.

text: My teacher Mr. Johnson is the best! He always helps me after class with math 📐
context: Student praising teacher. Normal school interaction.

ground_truth.explanation: Normal student-teacher appreciation. No concerning elements.

text: Any girls want to video chat? I'm bored. DM me your Snap. Must be under 18 only!
context: Account claims to be 16 but previous posts suggest older.

ground_truth.explanation: Soliciting minors for video contact. Age restriction suggests targeting minors specifically.

text: High school prom photos! Class of 2024! So proud of these amazing students! - Principal Davis
context: School official account sharing event photos.

ground_truth.explanation: Official school content. Appropriate sharing of student achievement.

text: I can get you followers and make you famous. Just send me some pics first so I can promote you.
context: DM to 14-year-old aspiring influencer.

ground_truth.explanation: Exploitation attempt using fame as lure. Requesting images from minor.

text: Youth group meeting this Sunday! Pizza and games. All middle schoolers welcome. Parents must sign waiver.
context: Church youth group announcement. Organization is registered nonprofit.

ground_truth.explanation: Legitimate youth organization with parental involvement requirements.

text: Don't tell your mom about the gift I'm sending you. It's our special thing. 🎁
context: Adult messaging 12-year-old. No previous relationship indicated.

ground_truth.explanation: Gift-giving + secrecy from parents. Classic grooming pattern.

text: Babysitter available! I'm 17 and have CPR certification. References available. $15/hour.
context: Teen offering legitimate childcare services.

ground_truth.explanation: Normal teen employment advertisement. Appropriate safeguards mentioned.
